sections.title: Interacting with the green campfire with a mask of ranul equipped

lines.speaker: Chosen Aluinus
lines.text: Hmm... Such potential. Such a waste...

sections.title: Interacting with the green campfire with a helmet of the moon equipped

lines.speaker: Chosen Aluinus
lines.text: That helmet... Don't think it protects you... Don't think it hides the truth...
